title: Check if a number is positive or negative

content.problemStatement:
Write a program to check if a given number is even or odd. 
A number is considered:
- `Even` if it is divisible by 2 (i.e., the remainder when divided by 2 is 0).
- `Odd` if it is not divisible by 2 (i.e., the remainder when divided by 2 is 1).

---
**Steps to Complete:**

1. Take an integer as input.
2. Use `if-else` statements to check if the number is even or odd.
3. Print the appropriate message.

---
